svg.title: Bus Station A: Visible Conveyor Ring
svg.desc: Ring is a visible double-rail conveyor track. Modules bolt to the outside. Solar extends inward. Material packets visible on the track. Clean industrial.
svg.text: Double-rail track bus. Modules bolt to outside. Solar extends inward. Material packets on track.
Ring is a double-rail conveyor. Material packets (colored blocks) ride the track.
Modules bolt to outside via bracket + port. Each port labeled IN/OUT. Dock is a track gap.
Solar arrays extend inward on struts. Heat fins radiate outward. Flow is clockwise.
Scaffolds show planned expansion. Track breaks at dock for ship entry.
